name: multi-path-hook-prompts-stay-separate
tags: hook prompt multiple paths return done continue DRY clarity mcp tool task:1ac0c420
body:
When a tool has multiple return paths (done, continue, error), write a separate __hook__ prompt per path — do not share a single builder.

**Why:** Each path has different context and different next-action instructions. Sharing a builder forces awkward conditionals and obscures intent. Three clear prompts beat one clever function.

**How to apply:** For each return json.dumps(...) block, write the hook_prompt string inline above it.
